titleStmt.title: SII 5.747: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 747. (A.R. No. 183 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru maṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭannt Aiyum cirttanic celviyum poṟcayap pāvaiyu n=ta n perun=te viyarāki Iṉpura ne ṭituvāḻ Ūḻiuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭu n tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷk koḷḷippākkamu naṇṇaṟkaru muraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭ liḻattaracarta muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaiytta cuntara muṭiyum Intiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻutuma Eṟipaṭaik koḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḷ muṭiyum caṅkatir velai ceṅkatir mālaiyum tolperuṅkāva
l ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟirutaku muṭiyu māpperun taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājentra coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu śrīrākavaccakra vattikaḷukku nilaṉ kal veṭṭiyatu śrīkkuṟuṅkuṭi vāykkālukku mekkum patiṉoṉṟāṅ kaṇāṟṟu virakeraḷappilaāṟṟukku vaṭakkum paṉṉiraṇṭāñ ceyyilum patiṉmūṉṟāñ ceyyilumāka vaḻi ni kki ni laṉ mukkāṇi muntirikaiyum Iteṉmelai paṉṉiraṇṭāṅkaṇāṟṟu Ippilāṟṟukku vaṭakku paṉṉiraṇṭāñ ceyyil pāṟai ni kki ni laṉ mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum patiṉmuṉṟāñcey
kku ni laṉ kāṇi Araikkāṇi Araiyum śrīpuruṣottama vāykkālukku kiḻakku pattāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu virakeraḷapilāṟṟukku teṟku nā lāñ ceyyil ceyaṟkiṭaiya ni laṉ Araimā muntirikaiyum Añcāñ ceyyum śrīmātavavāykkālukku kiḻakku Eṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu śrīvāsudevanā rāyattukku teṟku patiṉāṟāñ ceykkuṟaini laṉ kāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻai Oṉpatāṅ kaṇāṟṟu Innārāyattukku vaṭakku patiṉāṟāñ ceykkuṟaiyum patiṉeḻāñ ceykkuṟaiyum Āka ni laṉ kāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ kiḻai pattāṅ kaṇāṟṟu Innārāyattukku vaṭakku patiṉañcāñ ceyyil
tiṭal nīkki ni laṉ Araimāvum Itaṉ kiḻai patiṉmuṉṟāṅ kaṇāṟṟu Innārāyattukku vaṭakku Eḻāñ ceyyil tiruppiṭaimarutil te var te vatāṉan nikkina ni laṉ mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum śrīmātavavāykkālukku meṟkku Irupatteṭṭāṅ kaṇāṟṟum Irupattoṉpatāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟumāka parameśva ranārā yattukku vaṭakku patiṉañcāñ ceyyilum patiṉāṟāñ ceyyilumāka kuḻi van=ta vāṟ ṟāl ni laṉ Orumāvum virakeraḷavāykkālukku meṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Ivvākkālukku vaṭakku
mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟumāka pukaḻikāmanārāyattukku vaṭakkum mutaṟ ceykaḷilum Iraṇṭāñ ceykaḷilumāka kuḻi vantavāṟṟāṟ ni laṉ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyey mukkālum vālik kku mekku tukku vaṭakku mutaṟceyyil Īram pokki ni laṉ Araimā mun=ti rikaiyum śrīmātavavāykkālukku mekku Irupattiraṇṭāṅ kaṇāṟṟu śrīvāsudevan Ārāyattukku teṟku nālāñ ceyyil kuḻi vantavāṟṟāl ni laṉ mūkkāṇi Araikkāṇi
yum Ittevarkku Iṭṭa pulakkuḷam kallāttāṉerikku Ellaiyāvatu Ivveriyiṉ vaṭakaṭaip pāṟaiyiṉiṉṟum vaṭakiḻakku nokki vaḻiyiṉ kiḻvaḻiyey kiṭan=ta citaṭṭuppoṟṟaikkut terkku [pāyccāṟṟukku merkku teṉṉellai kaṭavaṉ ṉakkaṉ kolini ṉṟum mekku nokki kallāttāṉerikiḻai Empaliṉ teṉkaṭaikkey Eṟappokavum Ivvempalum Ivvempaliṉ ni rna kkalum kallāttāṉerikku Eḻum Ikkuḷattiṉ ni rna kkalum Itaṉ lkarai kiṇaṟum
Iṟaiyaṉaraiccūr nīlakaṇṭaṉ maticūti somāciyār paṇikka korañcittā comaṉār paṇikka kuravaceri māṉār paṇikka kaṇṇaṉūr braha- tattaṉ tāmotiraṉār paṇikka paṇip paṇiyāl paṇiccu tiṭṭuk kuṭuttom mā[sa]bh Aiyom Iv Ai ni lakaṇṭaṉ maticūtaṉ ṉeḻuttu [*.]
Digital edition of SII 5.747 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
